data.body: Investigation complete. Proposed fix was reviewed and DENIED: the error message for check-plugin-self-ref.sh cannot include hardcoded 'plugins/dso' paths because this hook is distributed with the plugin and must be generic to any project install location. The fix would embed a project-specific path in a distributed file, violating plugin genericity. No code fix possible without changing the design. Leaving open for further design consideration — possible approach: use a variable placeholder like ${PLUGIN_DIR} in the error message instead of a hardcoded path.
